agreement.subtitle: Is study mein participate karne ke liye, please niche diye gaye terms padhein aur agree karein:
agreement.checkboxLabel: Maine upar diye gaye terms padh liye hain aur agree karta/karti hoon

screening.title: Screening Questions
screening.subtitle: Please in sawaalon ka jawab dein yeh dekhne ke liye ki aap is study ke liye qualify karte hain ya nahi.

questions.preStudySubtitle: Please kuch sawaalon ka jawab dein taaki hum aapki background samajh sakein.
questions.postStudySubtitle: Please apne experience ke baare mein kuch final sawaalon ka jawab dein.
questions.selectOptions: Sab select karein jo apply hote hain
questions.selectBetween: {min} aur {max} options ke beech mein chunein
questions.emailInvalid: Please ek valid email address daalein
questions.completeAllFields: Please saare location fields complete karein

thankYou.title: Shukriya!
thankYou.defaultMessage: Is study mein participate karne ke liye shukriya. Aapka response record ho gaya hai.
thankYou.redirecting: {seconds} second(s) mein redirect ho raha hai...

error.title: Kuch galat ho gaya
error.defaultMessage: Humein ek error mila. Please dobara try karein.
error.studyNotFoundMessage: Jo study aap dhundh rahe hain woh exist nahi karti ya band ho gayi hai.
error.studyTypeNotSupported: Is type ki study supported nahi hai.

submitting.title: Submit ho raha hai...
submitting.message: Please wait karein jab tak hum aapka response save karte hain.

password.title: Password Zaroori Hai
password.subtitle: Yeh study password protected hai. Continue karne ke liye please password daalein.
password.incorrect: Galat password. Please dobara try karein.

duplicate.title: Response Pehle Hi Submit Ho Chuka Hai
duplicate.message: Aapne yeh study pehle hi complete kar li hai. Multiple responses allowed nahi hain.

recording.consentDescription: Is study mein session recording shamil hai jo researchers ko samajhne mein madad karti hai ki participants prototype ke saath kaise interact karte hain.
recording.microphoneDescription: Jab aap tasks complete karein tab apni aawaz record karein (think-aloud protocol)
recording.screenDescription: Jab aap prototype ke saath interact karein tab apni screen capture karein
recording.webcamDescription: Session ke dauran aapka video record karein
recording.consentButton: Main consent deta/deti hoon - Recording shuru karein
recording.selectAllToContinue: Continue karne ke liye saare items select karein
recording.mobileNote: Note: Screen recording ke liye desktop browser zaroori hai. Mobile users sirf audio record karenge.

cardSort.allDone: Sab ho gaya! Jab aap ready hain toh "{buttonText}" pe click karein.
cardSort.cardsSorted: {total} mein se {sorted} cards sort ho gaye
cardSort.deleteCategoryConfirm: Kya aap sure hain ki aap yeh category delete karna chahte hain? Saare cards wapas chale jayenge.
cardSort.pleaseNameCategories: Submit karne se pehle please apni saari categories ka naam dein.
cardSort.pleaseSortAllCards: Submit karne se pehle please saare cards ko categories mein sort karein.

treeTest.instruction: Folders ko expand/collapse karne ke liye click karein. Woh item select karein jahan aapko yeh milega.
treeTest.skipTaskConfirm: Kya aap sure hain ki aap is task ko skip karna chahte hain?

prototypeTest.taskCompleteMessage: Bahut badhiya! Aapne yeh task complete kar liya hai.
prototypeTest.skipTaskMessage: Kya aap sure hain ki aap is task ko skip karke agle pe jaana chahte hain?

firstClick.clickOnImage: Us jagah pe click karein jahan aap yeh task complete karenge
firstClick.taskCompleteMessage: Bahut badhiya! Aapne yeh task complete kar liya hai.
